# What It Takes To Book 70+ Sales Calls/month with Cold Email

**Channel:** Matt Lucero  
**URL:** https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=b1I_NLeTChU  
**Date:** 2026-03-31  
**Content source:** auto-generated transcript

## Summary

This video features a case study interview between Matt Lucero and Brian from Agent Equity Group, an insurance brokerage that scaled from inconsistent cold outreach to booking 70-110+ qualified appointments per month using professional cold email services. The discussion covers the transition from failed DIY email attempts to systematic, high-volume lead generation that dramatically improved sales rep efficiency.

## Key Points & Strategies

- **Problem Diagnosis:** Identify when your current outreach method (cold calling, networking) doesn't scale
- **Email Account Warm-up:** Properly warming up email accounts before launch is critical for deliverability
- **Realistic Forecasting:** Set conservative initial projections, then exceed them—this case exceeded month-one targets by 4-8x
- **Expectation Management:** Understand that results aren't typical; focus on long-term CAC (Customer Acquisition Cost) to LTV (Lifetime Value) math
- **Pipeline Management:** Be prepared to handle volume—success can create the "problem" of too many leads
- **US-Based Support:** Working with domestic teams helps ensure better communication and strategy alignment
- **Sales Cycle Consideration:** In long-sales-cycle businesses (2-4 months), measure success by meetings booked, not immediate revenue
- **Efficiency Gains:** Cold email can replace multiple sales reps' worth of front-end prospecting work

## Workflows & Tools Discussed

- **SmartLead** - Technology platform used for cold email execution
- **Email Account Warm-up Process** - Pre-launch preparation of email accounts for better deliverability
- **Anivo Agency** - Matt Lucero's agency providing cold email strategy and execution
- **Appointment Scheduling & Rescheduling** - Team-based support for managing no-shows and booking confirmations

## Use Cases Covered

- **Insurance Brokerage (Agent Equity Group):** Cold email outreach to independent insurance agents to broker carrier contracts
- **Long Sales Cycles:** Business model where deals take 2-4 months and revenue isn't realized in year one
- **Scaling Sales Teams:** Using cold email efficiency to reduce reliance on hiring additional sales reps

## Quotes Worth Noting

> "It's been a tsunami of uh of amazing high-intent leads that came in. The number that you would put forth, I think we did that in the first week in which you thought we would do in the first month."

> "Even if we hire a new rep and he's getting five to 10 first appointments a month, like this is essentially replacing five or six reps type thing and just making them a lot more efficient and actually closing business."
